intentSynonyms: get a calendar view in outlook
look up a calendar view in outlook
fetch a single calendar view in outlook
view one specific calendar view in outlook
view events in a date range in outlook
description: Get the events occurring within a date/time range, with recurring series expanded into individual occurrences. This is the tool to answer "what is on my calendar" for a given day, week, or range. The range bounds are read from the offset in the start/end timestamps (UTC when no offset is given); time_zone only controls the zone of the returned event times.

start.description: Range start as ISO 8601. Include a UTC offset to anchor the zone (e.g. "2026-06-02T00:00:00-04:00"); without an offset it is treated as UTC.

end.description: Range end as ISO 8601. Include a UTC offset to anchor the zone (e.g. "2026-06-09T00:00:00-04:00"); without an offset it is treated as UTC.

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID to read (from list_calendars). Defaults to the primary calendar.

time_zone.description: Time zone for the returned event start/end times, e.g. "Eastern Standard Time" (does not shift the range bounds). Defaults to UTC.
